历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 670 → 366 → 344 → 338, showing a clear upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative advance of about 332 positions in the past 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 338; the provincial physics category enrollment plan was 29 students each year from 2022 to 2024, increasing to 33 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 22 students, a significant reduction of about 33.3% compared to 2025, leading to intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 18th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable range of 14th–18th in recent years; the 2026 reputation is slightly negative, involving academic misconduct incidents (such as paper data fabrication), but the university's handling attitude is positive; Douyin popularity ranking is 26th (relatively hot), with high short video exposure; the impact of the 2022 Henan enrollment gap incident has gradually dissipated, and the 2025 admission line abnormal attention is low; it has 17 A- and above disciplines including Civil Engineering A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Architecture A, Computer Science and Technology A, Transportation Engineering A+, etc., with outstanding engineering strength, strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.text: Engineering Experimental Classes (Computer and Electronics, Excellence Program, Guohao Elite Class) are the main enrollment bodies for the 2026 physics category, with high social popularity in information and intelligent networking directions; the total number of candidates in Ningxia in 2026 is approximately 66,000 (uncertain), estimated by historical proportion to be about 44,550 in the physics category, roughly the same as 2025; Tongji University is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal to northwestern candidates; the university's enrollment scale in Ningxia is small (22 students in the physics category), with a very low enrollment proportion, limiting the impact of regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 338, the significant enrollment reduction of 33.3% in 2026 leading to intensified competition, slightly negative reputation but strong engineering strength, and roughly stable candidate numbers, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to be approximately 262, with a range of 212–312.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Tongji University's Medicine category in Ningxia over the past four years are: 318th in 2022 (planned 3 students), 285th in 2023 (planned 5 students), 715th in 2024 (planned 6 students), and 555th in 2025 (planned 6 students). In 2024, the ranking dropped significantly to 715, mainly due to adjustments in subject selection requirements in the first year of the new college entrance examination reform; in 2025, it rebounded to 555, indicating a recovery in the popularity of medical majors. In 2026, the enrollment plan for Medicine will be reduced from 6 to 4 students (a 33.3% reduction), with the Medical Experimental Class and Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) each enrolling 2 students. The reduction in the plan will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tongji University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and has been selected as a Double First-Class construction university. Located in Shanghai, the university has strong comprehensive strength. Its medical disciplines rely on Tongji University's century-old medical heritage, and the Clinical Medicine major is particularly outstanding, enjoying a high reputation nationwide.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine majors have long been popular in college entrance examinations. Tongji University's Medical Experimental Class and Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) have a small enrollment scale in Ningxia (only 4 students), and the scarcity increases competition. As a first-tier city, Shanghai has strong regional appeal, further enhancing the willingness to apply for medical majors. Against the backdrop of enrollment reduction in 2026, competition for applications is expected to intensify.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the calculation of the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and analysis of historical ranking trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Tongji University's Medicine category in Ningxia in 2026 will be approximately 464th, with a fluctuation range of 414-514. This ranking is higher (more difficult to enter) than the 2025 ranking of 555th, mainly due to the 33.3% reduction in enrollment plan leading to intensified competition, while the popularity of medical majors remains high.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) as the main target, with the Medical Experimental Class as a stretch goal. Since there are only two majors in the Medicine category, each enrolling 2 students, overall competition is fierce. Candidates are advised to position themselves reasonably based on their own rankings.
